name: Followups: Create Template

description.en: Create a reusable follow-up message template with structured metadata like channel, sequence step, and delay. Pre-fills type=template and app=followups, then chains to the generic document-create warp so the actual storage logic stays in one place.
description.de: Ein wiederverwendbares Follow-up-Nachrichten-Template mit strukturierten Metadaten wie Kanal, Sequenz-Schritt und Verzögerung erstellen. Setzt type=template und app=followups voraus und chained dann zum generischen document-create Warp, damit die eigentliche Speicherlogik an einer Stelle bleibt.

bot: Use this when the user wants to create a new follow-up message template for an automated sequence. Collects structured inputs and chains to @joai-document-create with type=template and app=followups pre-filled.

inputs.name: Title
inputs.bot: A descriptive name for the follow-up template.

inputs.name: Content
inputs.bot: The template content with placeholder variables. Use {{name}}, {{company}}, etc. for personalization.

inputs.name: Slug
inputs.bot: Unique slug for the template. Used to reference it in sequences. Lowercase, hyphens, no spaces.

description.en: Channel: whatsapp, email, linkedin, or post
description.de: Kanal: whatsapp, email, linkedin oder post

inputs.name: Step
inputs.bot: Which step in the sequence this template represents.

inputs.name: Delay Days

description.en: Days to wait before this step (0 for first step)
description.de: Wartetage vor diesem Schritt (0 für den ersten Schritt)

inputs.bot: Number of days to wait after the previous step. Use 0 for the first step.

inputs.name: Variables
inputs.bot: List of variable names used in the template content.

success.en: Follow-up template fields collected — chaining to document-create.
